feed.title: Daily Digest
feed.subtitle: Quote, fact, life hack, fortune cookie, and headlines of the day

entry.title: Vercel CEO Guillermo Rauch on the fight to split off models from agents
entry.content: "The reality is, when you're optimizing for production, you start looking at a price/performance," Guillermo Rauch tells TechCrunch.

entry.title: Who could play a sour, unemployed, self-deprecating version of John Slattery? He had a surprising answer
entry.content: The 'Mad Men' star reflects on playing a washed-up version of himself, the fickleness of Hollywood and why broad comedy is harder than it looks.

entry.title: Lionel Richie 'doing well' after hitting pause on tour for unspecified health issue
entry.content: Lionel Richie seems to be moving past the unspecified health issue that prompted him to postpone a pair of shows on his summer tour with Earth, Wind & Fire. 'I'm doing well,' he says.

entry.title: Portugal vs. Spain live score, result, highlights from 2026 World Cup knockout game
entry.content: The Sporting News is tracking live scoring updates and highlights for Portugal vs. Spain in the 2026 FIFA World Cup. Follow for complete results from the Round of 16 match in Dallas.

entry.title: Where to watch Portugal vs. Spain live stream, TV channel, start time for World Cup Round of 16 match
entry.content: Here's everything you need to know to watch the Portugal vs. Spain World Cup match, including where to watch on TV or live stream, what time the game starts and more.

entry.title: You can now customize Siri’s pace and expressivity in the latest iOS 27 beta
entry.content: The update is part of Apple's broader effort to make Siri feel more natural and personal, as it rebuilds the assistant around generative AI.

entry.title: Portugal vs. Spain free live stream: How to watch World Cup game online without cable
entry.content: Cristiano Ronaldo and Lamine Yamal collide in the World Cup Round of 16 with a place in the quarterfinal on the line for Portugal or Spain.

entry.title: World Cup bracket 2026: Live updated FIFA knockout stages and printable version for download
entry.content: Download The Sporting News’ printable 2026 World Cup bracket, including expert tips and predictions to help pick every game in the Round of 16 and quarterfinals.

entry.title: Why Phillies' top trade deadline need might not be a righty-hitting outfielder
entry.content: The Phillies' top trade deadline need is an underrated one.

entry.title: Celtics officially cut ties with disgruntled $285 million star via lopsided trade to 76ers
entry.content: The Boston Celtics completed a blockbuster trade on Monday.

entry.title: Royals expected to gauge trade market for all-star Michael Wacha
entry.content: Fresh off his first All-Star selection since 2015, Royals veteran Michael Wacha has reestablished himself as one of baseball’s most dependable starters. With Kansas City falling out of the playoff race, his durability, postseason experience and team-friendly contract could make him one of the most coveted pitchers available before the MLB trade deadline.

entry.title: Every major tech layoff in 2026 that has name-checked AI
entry.content: A running look — in reverse chronological order — at the bigger tech companies that have announced significant layoffs this year with AI as a stated factor.

entry.title: Comcast's Sky to buy Britain's ITV in $2.1 billion deal
entry.content: The move comes a week after Comcast announced it would peel off its NBCUniversal and Sky units, creating a new public company

entry.title: Xbox cuts 3,200 jobs as gaming business struggles
entry.content: As Microsoft continues to invest majorly into AI, it's gaming division, Xbox, is making major cuts to its workforce and selling several of its studios.

entry.title: Amazon competitor Bookshop.org says Kobo e-reader support will happen this year after all
entry.content: Bookship.org seemed to delay this anticipated partnership again, but tells TechCrunch that it has settled business terms and is working on integration.

entry.title: AI actor Tilly Norwood to star in first movie
entry.content: AI actor Tilly Norwood will star in her first movie, a comedy drama called 'Misaligned.'

entry.title: The Hollywood Bowl just got its biggest sound upgrade in a generation. AI is doing the heavy lifting
entry.content: A new speaker array, an immersive surround system and machine-learning vocal isolation technology are transforming the experience at one of the world's most beloved concert venues.

entry.title: Bitcoin rebounds after Trump says he's become 'a big crypto guy'
entry.content: Earlier, bitcoin fell toward $60,000 after Strategy disclosed the sale of more of its holdings of the token.

entry.title: If you use Google, you’re training its AI. Here’s how to opt out.
entry.content: PSA: A change to Google's privacy settings let it train its AI on more of your data. Here's how to opt out.

entry.title: How the Cleveland Cavaliers appear inevitable as LeBron James' free agent landing spot
entry.content: Other teams, like the 76ers and Warriors, might be getting the sense for what's really happening here.

entry.title: Shedeur Sanders could thrive in Todd Monken's offense despite lacking Lamar Jackson's legs
entry.content: Todd Monken's offense once ran on elite legs, but a Cleveland Browns beat writer thinks the quarterback lacking them could still thrive.

entry.title: Red Wings' Dylan Larkin trade plans changed after offer sheet news
entry.content: The salary implications here are huge.

entry.title: Balogun's red card suspension lifted after Trump called FIFA chief
entry.content: Balogun's reinstatement came after President Trump called FIFA President Gianni Infantino last week and asked for a review of the red card suspension.

entry.title: Japanese forward Hachimura signs with Clippers: reports
entry.content: Japanese forward Rui Hachimura has agreed to a two-year NBA free agency deal worth $28 million with the Los Angeles Clippers, according to multiple reports on Monday.The 28-year-old playmaker made the deal, according to The Athletic and ESPN, hours ahead of the NBA period opening to allow teams to sign free agents for the 2026-27 campaign.

entry.title: Pac-12 adds seven schools for 2026 football season
entry.content: The Pac-12 is rebuilding with seven new schools joining Oregon State and Washington State for the 2026 season.

entry.title: Braves officially call up Owen Murphy, DFA Carlos Carrasco, recall JR Ritchie and place Martín Pérez on IL
entry.content: Last night, we reported that Owen Murphy would be the next big prospect call-up for the Atlanta Braves. This was after the news came out that Martín Pérez would likely be heading to the IL due to the injury that he suffered after getting hit with a comebacker during Sunday’s loss to the Mets. We […]

entry.title: How Lady Vols basketball, softball orange Adidas jerseys are nod to past
entry.content: The new orange Adidas jerseys for Lady Vols basketball and softball both include Summitt Blue, which is a nod to past Tennessee Adidas uniforms.

entry.title: Bills make big announcement for new Highmark Stadium
entry.content: The Bills are doing something additional at their new stadium.

entry.title: PFF names three Rebels in their 2026 Top 50 rankings
entry.content: Pro Football Focus is a highly respected and widely recognized analytics organization that is often used in both sports media and NFL front offices. That just means, what they put out, should be heard out. They recently released their top 50 rankings heading into the 2026 college football season and three Ole Miss Rebels made […]

entry.title: FIFA criticized for lifting U.S. star's red card suspension after Trump phone call
entry.content: Europe's soccer governing body and prominent commentators have criticized the decision, which allows Folarin Balogun to play against Belgium.

entry.title: Portugal vs. Spain projected lineups, starting 11 for World Cup Round of 16 game in Dallas
entry.content: The latest team news ahead of a huge World Cup Round of 16 game — and perhaps Cristiano Ronaldo's last.

entry.title: Why France is appealing Michael Olise yellow card to FIFA after Folarin Balogun decision
entry.content: It's turning into the World Cup of appeals.

entry.title: Kate Martin's contract update is big news for Caitlin Clark's former teammate
entry.content: Martin has earned this.

entry.title: Andrey Santos: Chelsea star’s thoughts on Man United move revealed
entry.content: After a rampant start to the summer transfer window, Manchester United’s midfield rebuild has begun to show signs of uncertainty. A £39 million agreement for Ederson was struck at the beginning of ...

entry.title: New York Giants fans share injury concerns after Jaxson Dart footage shared
entry.content: New York Giants quarterback Jaxson Dart is concerning a number of fans following his recent fourth of July celebrations. The Giants finished bottom of the NFC East last season, with an underwhelming 4-13 record to show for themselves.

entry.title: Red Bull STEMx helmets stolen at Silverstone as Calum Nicholas issues CCTV warning
entry.content: Calum Nicholas has condemned the theft of custom replica helmets from Red Bull’s STEMx van at Silverstone

entry.title: "Would have ended very differently": Luck for van der Linde in horror crash
entry.content: How a matter of meters ensured that Kelvin van der Linde did not fare worse in the DTM horror crash at the Norisring: Did the BMW save him?

entry.title: Potential UCLA commit Nikola Kusturica scores 37 against Team USA
entry.content: UCLA has been rumored to Nikola Kusturica and on Sunday Kusturica scored 37 points against Team USA.

entry.title: Dodgers' Breakout Star Deserved To Be An All-Star
entry.content: Should Justin Wrobleski have made the All-Star Game?

entry.title: Florida State basketball target commits to Big Ten power
entry.content: Florida State basketball target Kevin Savage has committed to the Purdue Boilermakers over the Seminoles.

entry.title: Station F ramps up as a launchpad for Europe’s hottest AI startups
entry.content: Station F, a Paris-based startup hub founded by French billionaire Xavier Niel, is gearing up for a new edition of its F/ai accelerator program in a bid to strengthen its positioning as a stepping stone for promising AI startups.

entry.title: Comcast buys the UK's biggest commercial broadcaster, ITV
entry.content: Comcast subsidiary Sky plans to buy the UK's biggest broadcaster, ITV.

entry.title: Alibaba gets a reprieve from US Chinese military ban
entry.content: A judge has ruled that the Pentagon must give Alibaba a reprieve over its placement on a Chinese military list.

entry.title: Smart glasses maker Even Realities hits $1B valuation with $150M funding led by Meituan, Tencent
entry.content: Even Realities, an ex-Apple team building camera-free smart glasses, raised $150M from Meituan and Tencent at a $1B valuation.

entry.title: Apple's foldable iPhone may be in short supply after it launches
entry.content: Many people who want Apple's rumored folding iPhone 'Ultra' may not be able to get it at first

entry.title: This humanoid robotics company is going public, but its CEO isn’t promising a robot in your home anytime soon
entry.content: While other humanoid startups chase sky-high valuations, Agility Robotics is betting its future on execution — and a SPAC.

entry.title: Erling Haaland cements superstar status, scores twice in Norway’s 2-1 win over Brazil
entry.content: Haaland delivered both goals as Norway defeated five-time champion Brazil and advanced to the World Cup quarterfinals for the first time in its history.

entry.title: ‘There Is No Going Back’: The Inside Story of Europe’s Rupture With America
entry.content: Trump’s tariffs, threats against Greenland spurred a rebellion by top leaders; the limits of “flattery diplomacy.”

entry.title: Mexico vs. England weather updates: Ligthning delays start of Round of 16 matchup
entry.content: Here's the latest on weather updates for Mexico vs. England.

entry.title: Mexico vs. England live score, result, highlights from 2026 World Cup knockout game
entry.content: The Sporting News is tracking live scoring updates and highlights for Mexico vs. England in the 2026 FIFA World Cup. Follow for complete results from the Round of 32 match in Mexico City.

entry.title: Is Harry Kane knighted? Why 'Sir Harry Kane' has taken over for England during World Cup
entry.content: This idea has taken on a life of its own.

entry.title: This is what's on Raul Jimenez's head while playing for Mexico at World Cup
entry.content: Jimenez is a top-level striker.

entry.title: Mexico vs. England free live stream: How to watch World Cup game online without cable
entry.content: Here's everything you need to know to watch the Mexico vs. England World Cup match, including where to watch on TV or live stream, what time the game starts and more.

entry.title: Why Raul Rangel is Mexico's goalie, not Guillermo Ochoa
entry.content: One face is a lot more recognizable than the other.

entry.title: Lakers trade rumor could lead to Dalton Knecht deal for record-setting $30 million Nuggets center
entry.content: The Los Angeles Lakers will likely make another roster move this summer.

entry.title: On the California Coast, a Picture-Perfect City Falls on Hard Times
entry.content: Santa Monica is starting to bounce back from a state of “fiscal distress” including financial woes, declining international tourism and fading retail.

entry.title: Fortune Cookie of the Day
entry.content:
He who throws mud loses ground.
Lucky Numbers: 99, 91, 37, 40, 14, 43

entry.title: Life Hack of the Day
entry.content: Use a coozie to cover your shift knob on hot days.

entry.title: Useless Fact of the Day
entry.content: Bruce Lee was so fast that they actually had to s-l-o-w film down so you could see his moves.

entry.title: Quote of the Day — Betty White
entry.content: “Don't take yourself too seriously, pretty soon you can find the humor in our everyday lives.” — Betty White

entry.title: Trump posts a doctored photo of the Obamas and Air Force One with graffiti spray-painted on plane
entry.content: Trump posts a doctored photo of the Obamas and Air Force One with graffiti spray-painted on plane

entry.title: Brazil’s loss to Norway leaves players and fans distraught and searching for answers
entry.content: The scenes were hard to watch inside MetLife Stadium as Brazilian fans were seen in tears toward the end of loss to Norway.

entry.title: Vessel forced out of New York ship parade over 'politically charged' banners
entry.content: Vessel forced out of New York ship parade over 'politically charged' banners

entry.title: FIFA reverses ban against U.S. men’s soccer star
entry.content: FIFA reversed a ban against Team USA’s star striker Folarin Balogun, who was set to sit out Monday’s game over a controversial red card. President Trump called FIFA’s president last week and asked him to review the red card according to a source familiar with the phone call. NBC News’ Dana Griffin reports.

entry.title: NHS to rate English trusts on tackling violence and racism towards staff
entry.content: Exclusive: Published league tables will rank acute, ambulance and mental health trusts on six measures The NHS will rate trusts according to how well they tackle racism, violence and sexual misconduct towards staff, the government has announced.From July, all NHS acute, ambulance and mental health trusts in England will be judged and ranked in published league tables on six main measures of wellbeing, affecting more than 1.5 million staff. Continue reading...

entry.title: Rodríguez defends Venezuela’s emergency earthquake response as number of bodies expected to soar
entry.content: Interim president says unrest will not break out despite anger at official response to the 24 June disasterVenezuela’s interim president has defended her country’s emergency response to the twin earthquakes that have killed more than 3,000 people, vowing the country would not descend into social unrest.Many Venezuelans have expressed anger at what they see as the US-backed government’s inadequate response to the 24 June disaster before international teams arrived. Continue reading...

entry.title: Uber’s European expansion plans may have hit a speed bump
entry.content: Back in February, Uber announced ambitious plans to launch in seven new European markets in 2026 — but now five of those launches are reportedly on hold.

entry.title: L.A. County heat advisory: When will high temperatures peak in SoCal?
entry.content: The National Weather Service issued a heat advisory, as parts of Los Angeles County could experience temperatures between the 80s and low 100s in valleys and away from the coast.

entry.title: 7/5: Face The Nation
entry.content: This week on "Face the Nation with Margaret Brennan," Ed O'Keefe speaks to NCAA President Charlie Baker. Meanwhile, Reps. Adriano Espaillat and Carlos Gimenez discuss immigration and their American stories.

entry.title: Florida Republican says deporting Haitians with TPS would be ‘huge mistake’
entry.content: ‘Haiti is a failed state’, says Carlos Giménez, congressman and Miami Cuban exile, after controversial court rulingCarlos Giménez, a Republican congressman from Florida, broke with the Trump administration on Sunday, calling on the White House to reconsider its push to eliminate temporary protected status (TPS) for Haitian migrants.Returning some 350,000 Haitians to their chaotic, dangerous homeland following the US supreme court’s ruling that the Trump administration can cut off temporary legal protections, would be a grave error, Giménez said. Continue reading...

entry.title: The stock market is about to suffer a ‘snapback’ and will lose much of this year’s gains as ‘speculation is hitting extreme levels,’ BofA warns
entry.content: The stock market is about to suffer a ‘snapback’ and will lose much of this year’s gains as ‘speculation is hitting extreme levels,’ BofA warns

entry.title: Mallory McMorrow suspends Senate campaign in Michigan
entry.content: State Sen. Mallory McMorrow announced on Sunday that she is suspending her campaign for Senate, narrowing the Democratic field ahead of the competitive August primary.

entry.title: Forget Wall Street. Elite Students Are Spending Their Summers on Startup Dreams.
entry.content: As AI disrupts traditional career paths, these college students are skipping corporate internships for San Francisco hacker houses and incubators.

entry.title: Extended interview: J.K. Simmons
entry.content: In this web exclusive, the character actor who won an Academy Award for "Whiplash" talks with correspondent Tracy Smith about his roles, the epitomes of real characters.

entry.title: Massive funeral for Iran's slain supreme leader enters second day
entry.content: The dayslong funeral for Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, who was killed in February by U.S.-Israeli strikes, has been marked by chants for revenge.

entry.title: Inside the all-star America250 concert at the L.A. Coliseum
entry.content: Chris Stapleton was the headlining act at a Fourth of July benefit concert that also featured Smashing Pumpkins, Chaka Khan, Maren Morris and Queen Latifah.

entry.title: Transcript: Reps. Adriano Espaillat and Carlos Gimenez on "Face the Nation with Margaret Brennan," July 5, 2026
entry.content: The following is the full transcript of an interview with Reps. Adriano Espaillat, Democrat of New York, and Carlos Gimenez, Republican of Florida, a portion of which aired on "Face the Nation with Margaret Brennan" on July 5, 2026. The interview was taped on July 2, 2026.

entry.title: Transcript: Former CDC chief medical officer Dr. Debra Houry on "Face the Nation with Margaret Brennan," July 5, 2026
entry.content: The following is the full transcript of an interview with former CDC chief medical officer Dr. Debra Houry, a portion of which aired on "Face the Nation with Margaret Brennan" on July 5, 2026. This interview was taped on July 1, 2026.

entry.title: Balogun suspension lifted ahead of World Cup match against Belgium
entry.content: U.S. Soccer said that it is "pleased" lead scorer Folarin Balogun will be able to compete against Belgium in Seattle, Washington.

entry.title: Why 3D TVs failed and the trouble with 3D in Hollywood.
entry.content: They were annoying to use and bad 3D movies didn't help.

entry.title: Full transcript of "Face the Nation with Margaret Brennan," July 5, 2026
entry.content: On this "Face the Nation with Margaret Brennan" broadcast, Reps. Adriano Espaillat and Carlos Giminez join Ed O'Keefe.

entry.title: Democrat Mallory McMorrow suspends her Michigan Senate campaign and scrambles the pivotal race
entry.content: Democrat Mallory McMorrow suspends her Michigan Senate campaign and scrambles the pivotal race

entry.title: USA vs. Serbia 2026 FIBA World Cup U17 box score: Full stats from the Final
entry.content: U17 Champion will be crowned.

entry.title: Orioles' report reveals Mike Elias' plans for 2026 MLB trade deadline
entry.content: This plan from the Orioles and Mike Elias is clear that they're looking to improve.

entry.title: Why Folarin Balogun red card ban was suspended by FIFA before USA vs. Belgium in World Cup
entry.content: The United States were preparing to contest a tense Round of 16 match against Belgium at the World Cup on Monday without their in-form starting striker Folarin Balogun, until suddenly he was made available.

entry.title: Caleb Williams turns doubters Into fuel ahead of Bears' brutal 2026 schedule
entry.content: Chicago Bears' young quarterback turns completion percentage criticism into confidence fuel while eyeing a deeper playoff run on the NFL's hardest 2026 slate.

entry.title: Nuggets, T-Wolves, Mavericks reportedly in bidding war for $101M four-time NBA champion, former MVP
entry.content: The Denver Nuggets, Dallas Mavericks, and Minnesota Timberwolves are in the running for the biggest free agent. In a list dropped by his agent, these teams have to feel good about where they are.

entry.title: Mariners trade deadline update is not a very exciting one for fans
entry.content: This doesn't look likely to be a fun deadline for the Mariners.

entry.title: Andrey Santos position, style of play: Why Man United reportedly want to sign Chelsea midfielder
entry.content: After missing out on Mateus Fernandes, Manchester United appear to have switched focus to Chelsea's Andrey Santos.

entry.title: Joe Thomas defends Shedeur Sanders as Cowboys pressure Browns on trade decision
entry.content: A Cleveland Browns legend defends keeping their young quarterback as Dallas Cowboys trade rumors intensify ahead of a high-stakes training camp battle.

entry.title: Sony says it will still make physical discs after 2028, as long as the game came out before then
entry.content: Anything released after 2028 will still be digital-only.

entry.title: U.S. star Folarin Balogun eligible to play vs. Belgium after FIFA suspends red card ban
entry.content: United States striker Folarin Balogun has been reinstated for the team’s round of 16 match against Belgium on Monday after earning a red card in the previous round, FIFA announced Sunday.

entry.title: 'Minions & Monsters' tops the box office, but with a lower-than-expected haul
entry.content: Universal Pictures and Illumination's animated "Minions & Monsters" movie opened this weekend, continuing a strong run for animated flicks in theaters.

entry.title: Delta Air Lines flight hit by firework while landing at Midway International Airport
entry.content: A Delta Air Lines flight landing in Chicago was hit by a firework as it was coming to land at Midway International Airport on Saturday.

entry.title: Former CDC official describes "pure chaos" as RFK Jr. sought to transform health agency
entry.content: Dr. Debra Houry, who served as chief medical officer at the CDC before leaving the agency in protest after then CDC director Susan Monarez was fired last year, told "Face the Nation with Margaret Brennan" that there was "pure chaos" when HHS Director Robert F. Kennedy took over, and she warned that the "scientific integrity" of federal health agencies are at risk.

entry.title: Face the Nation: Baker, Houry
entry.content: Missed the second half of the show? NCAA President Charlie Baker and former CDC medical officer Dr. Debra Houry join.

entry.title: Transcript: NASA administrator Jared Isaacman on "Face the Nation with Margaret Brennan," July 5, 2026
entry.content: The following is the transcript of an interview with NASA administrator Jared Isaacman that aired on "Face the Nation with Margaret Brennan" on July 5, 2026.

entry.title: A Sudden Glut of Oil Threatens to Weaken Iran’s Hand in Talks
entry.content: Cheaper, more plentiful crude offers countries a chance to refill stockpiles more quickly and counter Tehran’s ability to use the Strait of Hormuz for leverage.

entry.title: Macron will visit Syria as the first Western leader since Assad's ouster, Damascus says
entry.content: Macron will visit Syria as the first Western leader since Assad's ouster, Damascus says

entry.title: Full Interview: Reps. Adriano Espaillat and Carlos Gimenez
entry.content: Watch Ed O'Keefe's full interview with Reps. Adriano Espaillat, Democrat of New York, and Carlos Gimenez, Republican of Florida. A portion of this interview aired on "Face the Nation with Margaret Brennan" on July 5, 2026. Editor's note: This interview was taped on July 2, 2026.
